title: U.S. intelligence says Iran can outlast Trump’s Hormuz blockade for months
summary_full: A confidential intelligence community assessment delivered to the White House also finds that Iran retains a substantial missile and drone arsenal.
summary_public: A confidential intelligence community assessment delivered to the White House also finds that Iran retains a substantial missile and drone arsenal.

IR.label: neutral
